## Adeptus Ministorum

![][image1]

### Adeptus Ministorum Special Rules

**Battle Hymns.** At the start of each Turn, choose one of the following Hymns. That Hymn is being spoken by each of your ORATOR models during that Turn, so long as it is not Down. Each ORATOR and each friendly ECCLESIARCHY model within 6” of it have the benefits of the chosen Hymn.

* **The Emperor Protects.** The armour of affected models have IMPERVIOUS, and \-DICE can always be applied to Injury roll against them even if another rule would prevent this.  
* **The Emperor’s Strength.** Affected models have ARMOUR PIERCING 1 with all of their melee attacks, stacking with other sources of ARMOUR PIERCING.  
* **The Righteousness of the Emperor.** Affected models have \+1 DICE to Hit with ranged attacks that are made against targets within half the attack’s maximum range (this still applies only at half range even if the attack ignores Long Range or hits automatically).

**Rally the Flock.** During a campaign, keep a running total of your Flock points, beginning at 0\. You earn Flock points in the following ways:

* **Defend the Holy Land.** At the end of each battle, if there are no enemy models in your deployment zone, you earn 1 Flock.  
* **Despise the Enemy.** At the end of each battle, if you took at least half of the enemy models Out of Action, you earn 1 Flock.  
* **Never Cease.** At the end of each battle, if at all times during that battle you had at least one ORATOR model on the battlefield that was not Down, you earn 1 Flock.  
* **Show Your Faith.** The first time one of your Elite models, or your Miraculist, scores a Glorious Deed during each battle, you earn 1 Flock.  
* **Spread the Holy Word.** The first time one of your ORATOR models ends a Turn in the enemy deployment zone while it is not Down, you earn 1 Flock.

*Spending Flock Points*  
You can spend your Flock points in the following ways:

* **Gather.** When recruiting Mercenaries, you can spend Flock Points to reduce the Glory cost by 1 for every 5 Flock you spend.  
* **Pray.** When one of your Elite models would roll on the Elite Trauma table, you can spend 2 Flock to roll twice and choose one of the results. You must choose to do this before rolling.  
* **Replace.** When one of your non-Elite, non-Mercenary models becomes a casualty, you can spend 1 Flock to replace that model for free. You still lose any of its battlekit.  
* **Sacrifice.** When you Explore, you can spend 3 Flock to gain the Lucky Exploration Skill during that exploration.  
* **Seek.** When you Explore, you can spend 2 Flock to gain the Seek Exploration Skill during that exploration.

### Adeptus Ministorum Patrons

Your patron can be the Ecclesiastic Cardinal or Lord Inquisitor Shared Patron.

### Adeptus Ministorum Unique Battlekit

#### Adeptus Ministorum Weapons

* **Brazier of Holy Fire.** HELD, FIRE, \+1 INJURY DICE against targets with DAEMON or PSYKER Keyword  
  * Strike: Melee, MAIN HAND ONLY  
  * Unleash: 12”, FLAMETHROWER, IGNORE ARMOUR. This attack can be made only once per battle.  
* **Dartmask.** 6”, IGNORE LONG RANGE, GAS, ASSAULT, THROWN  
* **Incentiviser.** Melee, CUMBERSOME, STUN, TWO-HANDED. As an Action with no roll required, the wielder can grant one ally within 1” of it \+1 DICE to Dash Success Rolls during that ally’s next Activation, or this Activation if the wielder and that ally are activating as a FIRETEAM.  
* **Mace of Censure.** Melee, \+1 INJURY MODIFIER, STUN  
* **Null Skull.** Melee, \+1 INJURY DICE against targets with DAEMON or PSYKER Keyword, the carrier gains FEAR and can Deny the Witch as if it had PSYKER 1\.  
* **Zealot’s Vindictor.** TWO-HANDED, HELD  
  * Chain Blade: Melee, CRITICAL, RISKY, SHRAPNEL, CUMBERSOME  
  * Torch: 8”, FLAMETHROWER, IGNORE ARMOUR, FIRE

#### Adeptus Ministorum Equipment

* **Reliquarius.** HELD. While the carrier is not Down, Injury rolls against the carrier and allies within 4” of it have \-1 DICE.  
* **Sanctification Orbs.** The equipped model’s attacks with FIRE have \+1 INJURY DICE if the target is within 8”. Cannot be carried along with any thrown weapon.

### Adeptus Ministorum Campaign Shop

During a campaign, these pieces of battlekit are available only when your Warband is specifically allowed to purchase them.

* **Ardent Blade** **(6 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Elite Only).** FIRE, TWO-HANDED, HELD  
  * Strike: Melee, \+1 INJURY DICE  
  * Torch: 10”, AUTOMATIC 2, FLAMETHROWER, IGNORE ARMOUR  
* **Blade of Admonition (3 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Elite Only).** Melee, ARMOUR PIERCING 2\. The equipped model gains the FEAR Keyword. This Keyword cannot be ignored by any Chaos model, even if that model itself has FEAR.  
* **Book of St. Lucius (3 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Orator Only).** Friendly models benefit from Battle Hymns while within 12” of the equipped model rather than 6”.  
* **Castigator (3 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Elite Only).** 12” or Melee (Always uses Ranged Skill), VICIOUS 11, IGNORE ARMOUR, CRITICAL, Scope. Injuries caused by this weapon cannot benefit from \-DICE.  
* **Cloak of St. Aspira (5 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Elite Only, Armour).** \-2 to Injury rolls, IMPERVIOUS  
* **Desvalle’s Holy Circle (4 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Elite Only).** Counts as a Rosarius, and all Injury rolls against the wearer have \-1 DICE.  
* **Font of Fury (4 Glory, LIMIT: 1).** 8”, \+1 INJURY DICE, ASSAULT, BLAST 3”, GAS, IGNORE COVER, IGNORE LONG RANGE, IGNORE ARMOUR, THROWN, additional \+1 INJURY DICE against models with the DAEMON Keyword. Can be used only once per battle.  
* **Icon of Sanctity (2 Glory, LIMIT: 1).** HELD. While the carrier is not Down, enemies within 6” of it treat all of your models as if they had the FEAR Keyword, and your models within 6” ignore the FEAR Keyword.  
* **Mace of Valaan (5 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Confessor Only).** HELD.  
  * Strike: Melee, \+1 DICE when used in main hand, ARMOUR PIERCING 1  
  * Smite: 12”, Ignores Line of Sight, IGNORE COVER, IGNORE LONG RANGE  
* **Sigil Ecclesiasticus (2 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Orator Only).** As an Action that requires no roll, the equipped model can choose a Battle Hymn. That Hymn becomes the Hymn being spoken by all of your ORATOR models for the remainder of the Turn, instead of the one you chose at the start of the Turn.

### Adeptus Ministorum Elites

#### 1 Confessor (Cost: 70 Credits \+ 15 for rosarius)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Confessor | 6”/Infantry | \+2 | \+2 | 0 | 25-32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Confessor must be equipped with a Rosarius. It can be equipped with any other weapons, armour, or equipment from the Adeptus Ministorum Armoury.

**Abilities**

* **Commanding Declamation.** Once during each battle, when an enemy model makes a Success Roll while within 6” of the Confessor, you can cause that Success Roll to be rolled at \-2 DICE.  
* **Lead The Procession.** Whenever the Confessor takes the Standard Move, Retreat, or Charge Action, before moving, each friendly ECCLESIARCHY model within 6” of the Confessor can move up to 3”, including into or out of close combat, but if they leave close combat, this counts as a Retreat Action and allows for free attacks as normal.

**Keywords**  
ECCLESIARCHY, ELITE, LEADER, NEGATE FEAR, ORATOR, TOUGH

#### 0-2 Missionary (Cost: 50 Credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Missionary | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+1 | 0 | 25-32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Missionary can be equipped with any weapons, armour, or equipment from the Adeptus Ministorum Armoury.

**Abilities**

* **Spread The Word Of The God-Emperor.** While it is not within 6” of any other friendly model, the Missionary has VICIOUS 10 with all attacks it makes.

**Keywords**  
ECCLESIARCHY, ELITE, NEGATE FEAR, ORATOR

#### 0-1 Drill Abbot (Cost: 50 Credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Drill Abbot | 6”/Infantry | N/A | \+1 | 0 | 25-28mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Drill Abbot can be equipped with any melee weapons, armour, or equipment from the Adeptus Ministorum Armoury.

**Abilities**

* **Schola Progenium Disciplinarian.** BLOOD MARKERS and STUN MARKERS cannot be spent on the attack Success Rolls of the Drill Abbot or any friendly ECCLESIARCHY model within 6” of it.

**Keywords**  
ECCLESIARCHY, ELITE, NEGATE FEAR, STRONG

### Adeptus Ministorum Troops

#### Preacher (Cost: 30 Credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Preacher | 6”/Infantry | \+0 | \+0 | 0 | 25mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Preacher can be equipped with any weapons, armour, or equipment from the Inquisition Armoury.

**Abilities**

* **Carry the Faith.** The Preacher is always considered in range of a friendly ORATOR model for the purposes of the Prayers to the Emperor special rule, so long as there is at least one friendly ORATOR on the battlefield that is not Down.

**Upgrades**

* **Conflagrator.** Up to 2 Preachers can be upgraded to Conflagrators for \+10 credits each, allowing them to ignore the HEAVY Keyword of one ranged weapon they carry. This does not allow it to carry more than one piece of HEAVY battlekit.

**Keywords**  
ECCLESIARCHY

#### 0-4 Crusader (Cost: 45 Credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Crusader | 6”/Infantry | \+0 | \+1 | 0 | 25mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Crusader can be equipped with any weapons, armour, or equipment from the Adeptus Ministorum Armoury.

**Abilities**

* **Irrrepressable Purpose.** When the Crusader is taken Out of Action, before removing it from the table, it can make a single melee attack against an enemy it is in close combat with. BLOOD MARKERS cannot be spent on this attack's Success Roll.  
* **Warrior of Faith.** The Crusader can ignore the HEAVY Keyword of one melee weapon it wields. This does not allow it to carry more than one piece of HEAVY battlekit, and it must still use the normal number of hands.

**Keywords**  
ECCLESIARCHY

#### 0-3 Death Cult Assassin (Cost: 65 Credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Death Cult Assassin | 8”/Infantry | \+1 | \+1 | 0 | 25mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Death Cult Assassin can be equipped with any melee weapons, Pistols, Dart Mask, Throwing Knives, armour, or equipment from the Adeptus Ministorum Armoury.

**Abilities**

* **Bladed Stance.** When an enemy Charges the Death Cult Assassin, if the Death Cult Assassin has not Activated this Turn, it can immediately take the Fight Action against that enemy before it takes any further actions. This can be done only once per Turn, and the Death Cult Assassin counts as having already taken the Fight Action during its Activation this Turn.

**Keywords**  
DEATH CULT, ECCLESIARCHY, INFILTRATOR, STEALTH

#### 0-2 Battle Cherub (Cost: 25 Credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Battle Cherub | 6”/Flying | \+0 | \+0 | 0 | 25mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Battle Cherub can be equipped with a single Pistol, Basic Melee Weapon, Incentiviser, Musical Instrument, or Troop Flag. It cannot be equipped with any other weapons, armour, or equipment.

**Abilities**

* **Companion.** Select one other non-ARTIFICIAL, non-BEAST model in your Warband at the start of the battle. The Incentiviser Cherub forms a FIRETEAM with that model. That model is its owner.

**Keywords**  
ARTIFICIAL, ECCLESIARCHY, FLYING, NO PROMOTION

#### 0-1 Miraculist (Cost: 115 Credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Miraculist | 6”/Infantry | \+3 | \+0 | 0 | 25-28mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Miraculist is equipped with its holy powers, listed below. It cannot be equipped with any other weapons, armour, or equipment.

* **Burning Hands.** Melee, \+1 INJURY DICE, IGNORE ARMOUR, FIRE. This attack hits automatically, but can be used only once during each battle.  
* **Holy Light.** 12”, IGNORE COVER, IGNORE ARMOUR, CRITICAL, FIRE. Can be used only once during each battle.  
* **Wreath In Fire.** 0” (counts as a ranged attack), can be used in close combat instead of melee weapons, does not affect self, FLAMETHROWER, IGNORE ARMOUR, BLAST 6”, FIRE. Can be used only once during each battle.

**Abilities**

* **Armour of Faith.** Injury rolls made against the Miraculist have \-1 DICE.  
* **The Emperor’s Grace.** Once per battle, when the Miraculist is taken Out of Action for any reason, treat the result as No Effect instead.

**Keywords**  
ECCLESIARCHY, NO PROMOTION, ORATOR

### Adeptus Ministorum Mercenaries

You can hire the following mercenaries.

#### Assassinorum Mercenaries

**Max 1 per Warband:**

* 0-1 Adamus Assassin (Cost: 6 Glory)  
* 0-1 Callidus Assassin (Cost: 6 Glory)  
* 0-1 Culexus Assassin (Cost: 6 Glory)  
* 0-1 Eversor Assassin (Cost: 6 Glory)  
* 0-1 Vanus Infocyte (Cost: 6 Glory)  
* 0-1 Venenum Assassin (Cost: 6 Glory)  
* 0-1 Vindicare Assassin (Cost: 6 Glory)

#### Ecclesiarchy Mercenaries

* 0-2 Arco-Flagellant (Cost: 3 Glory)  
* 0-1 Dialogus (Cost: 4 Glory)  
* 0-1 Hospitaller (Cost: 3 Glory)  
* 0-1 Salvationist (Cost: 2 Glory)

#### Law Mercenaries

* 0-1 Arbites Enforcer (Cost: 3 Glory)  
* 0-1 Hardcase Cyber Mastiff (Cost: 3 Glory)  
* 0-1 Sister of Silence (Cost: 4 Glory)

#### Mars Mercenaries

* 0-1 Autosavant (Cost: 3 Glory)  
* 0-1 Combat Servitor (Cost: 3 Glory)  
* 0-1 Gun Servitor (Cost: 3 Glory)

#### Military Mercenaries

* 0-1 Deathworld Veteran (Cost: 4 Glory)  
* 0-1 Penal Legionnaire (Cost: 3 Glory)  
* 0-1 Ratling Sniper (Cost: 3 Glory)

#### Space Marine Mercenaries

* 0-1 Lone Primaris Marine (Cost: 4 Glory)

**Max 1 per Warband:**

* 0-1 Black Templar Crusader (Cost: 5 Glory)  
* 0-1 Blood Angels Sanguinary Guard (Cost: 6 Glory)  
* 0-1 Dark Angel Knight (Cost: 5 Glory)  
* 0-1 Grey Knight Paladin (Cost: 6 Glory)  
* 0-1 Imperial Fist Heavy Gunner (Cost: 5 Glory)  
* 0-1 Iron Hands Heavy Gunner (Cost: 5 Glory)  
* 0-1 Raven Guard Corvus Marine (Cost: 5 Glory)  
* 0-1 Space Wolves Wulfen (Cost: 6 Glory)  
* 0-1 White Scars Outrider (Cost: 6 Glory)

#### Other Imperial Mercenaries

* 0-1 Astropath (Cost: 2 Glory)  
* 0-1 Canid Companion (Cost: 2 Glory)  
* 0-1 Lone Inquisitor (Cost: 6 Glory)  
* 0-1 Navigator (Cost: 3 Glory)  
* 0-1 Ogryn Bodyguard (Cost: 5 Glory)  
* 0-1 Rejuvenat Adept (Cost: 2 Glory)  
* 0-1 Sanctioned Psyker (Cost: 3 Glory)

### Warband Variant: Ecclesiastic Militant Force

* **Sororitas Support.** You can recruit up to 1 Dogmata or 1 Palatine, up to 4 Battle Sisters (max 1 Retributor, 1 Sacrosant, and 1 Zephyrim *or* Seraphim), and up to 3 Repentia from the Adepta Sororitas Faction. You can also recruit up to 1 Penitent Engine, but you cannot recruit both a Penitent Engine and a Miraculist.  
    
  If a piece of battlekit appears in the Adeptus Ministorum Armoury as well as the Adepta Sororitas Armoury, you must obey the highest LIMIT between those Armouries. Models can still only be equipped from their own Armoury unless otherwise stated. You can also purchase Campaign Shop battlekit from the Adepta Sororitas Faction, which can be used by models from that Faction.  
* **Fervor.** Your Battle Hymns special rule applies to your SORORITAS models. Once during each of their activations, your Palatine models’ Rapturous Blows Ability can be treated as if you discard a Miracle so long as the Palatine is within 3” of a friendly ORATOR model.  
* **Decree Passive.** You cannot recruit any Crusaders, Death Cult Assassins, or Drill Abbots.
